hero.title: The High-Performance Starter
hero.description: Build stunning, lightning-fast web applications with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, and Edge-first principles. Professional code, simplified architecture.

features.title: Built for Performance
features.description: Everything you need to ship production-ready applications in record time.

edge.title: Edge Ready
edge.description: Optimized for Vercel Edge Functions and global distribution.

i18n.title: Full i18n
i18n.description: Seamless internationalization with next-intl and RTL support.

theme.title: Dark Mode
theme.description: First-class dark mode support with automatic theme detection.

security.title: Secure by Default
security.description: CSRF protection, secure headers, and environment validation.

state.title: State Management
state.description: Lightweight client state with Zustand and SWR caching.

testing.title: Fully Tested
testing.description: Vitest and Playwright integrated for robust quality assurance.

one.content: Bypass simplified our entire global deployment. The edge-first approach is a game-changer.
one.author: Sarah Chen

two.content: The best Next.js boilerplate I've ever used. The i18n and RTL support are top-notch.
two.author: Ahmed Mansour

three.content: Clean code, great architecture, and beautiful components. Highly recommended!
three.author: Julia Smith

cta.title: Ready to build your next big idea?
cta.description: Join thousands of developers building the future of the web with Bypass.
